summary: Completed full e2e testing of DADA PRINT ART website - all backend APIs and frontend features working correctly
test_credentials: No authentication required for this app
seed_data_creation: Test data created with TEST_ prefix during testing (contacts and quotes)
context_for_next_testing_agent: All features tested and working: Backend APIs (/api/, /api/contact POST/GET, /api/quote POST/GET), validation (422 for invalid email/missing fields), data persistence. Frontend: All 6 pages load correctly (Home, About, Services, Industries, Gallery, Contact), navigation works, mobile menu toggle works, gallery filter buttons work, quote form submission works with success toast, contact form submission works with success toast, mailto/tel links present and correct.

backend: POST /api/contact - creates contact with required fields
POST /api/contact - creates contact with optional fields
POST /api/quote - creates quote with required fields
POST /api/quote - creates quote with optional fields
frontend: Home page loads with hero, CTAs, navbar
Quote form submission with success toast
Contact form submission with success toast
